<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0,maximum-scale=1.0,user-scalable=no,viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<title>Juez | Parkour Scoring Pro</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
:root{
  --speed:#0284c7;--freestyle:#059669;--skills:#d97706;
  --danger:#dc2626;--ok:#16a34a;
  --bg:#f1f5f9;--card:#ffffff;
  --border:#cbd5e1;--border2:#e2e8f0;
  --text:#0f172a;--text2:#475569;--text3:#94a3b8;
  --dark:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c4a6e 0%,#064e3b 100%);
  --safe-b:env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px);
}
html,body{height:100%;width:100%;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)}
.screen{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}
.screen.active{display:flex}

/* logos siempre con fondo blanco */
img.logo-evt{object-fit:contain;background:#ffffff;border-radius:6px}
img.emood{object-fit:contain;background:transparent}

#fs-btn{position:fixed;bottom:14px;right:14px;z-index:9999;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--dark);padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.conn-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#4ade80;animation:beat 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;display:inline-block;margin-right:5px}
@keyframes beat{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(1.3)}}
.tb-right{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:#fff}

/* ══ SPLASH ══ */
#sc-splash{background:var(--dark);align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:40px 28px;gap:18px}
.spl-logo{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.spl-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;background:#fff}
.spl-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(24px,6vw,40px);font-weight:900;color:#fff}
.spl-sub{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
.btn-spl{background:#fff;border:none;color:#0c4a6e;border-radius:14px;padding:15px 40px;font-size:17px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}

/* ══ LOGIN ══ */
#sc-login{background:var(--bg)}
.lgn-top{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--dark);padding:14px 18px 16px}
.lgn-top-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.lgn-ev-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:12px}
.lgn-ev-logo{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.lgn-ev-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;background:#fff}
.lgn-ev-name{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.1}
.lgn-ev-date{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-top:2px}

/* scroll body — todo entra aquí */
.lgn-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;padding:18px 18px calc(20px + var(--safe-b))}
.flabel{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px}

/* ROL — 2 cards grandes */
.role-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}
.role-card{padding:20px 12px 18px;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border2);border-radius:14px;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all .15s;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.role-card .ri{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px}
.role-card .rn{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
.role-card .rs{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:3px}
.role-card.active{border-color:var(--speed);background:#eff8ff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(2,132,199,.12)}
.role-card.active .rn{color:var(--speed)}

/* DISCIPLINA — 3 chips */
.disc-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px}
.disc-chip{padding:14px 6px 12px;text-align:center;border-radius:12px;border:2px solid var(--border2);background:var(--card);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;line-height:1.3;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.disc-chip .di{font-size:20px;display:block;margin-bottom:5px}
.disc-chip.speed.active  {border-color:var(--speed);background:#eff8ff;color:var(--speed);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(2,132,199,.12)}
.disc-chip.freestyle.active{border-color:var(--freestyle);background:#ecfdf5;color:var(--freestyle);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(5,150,105,.12)}
.disc-chip.skills.active {border-color:var(--skills);background:#fffbeb;color:var(--skills);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(217,119,6,.12)}

/* TIPO DE JUEZ — grilla 2 col */
.jtype-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px}
.jtype-pill{
  padding:14px 10px;text-align:center;
  background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border2);border-radius:12px;
  cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);
  transition:all .15s;line-height:1.3;
  box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}
.jtype-pill.active{border-color:var(--speed);background:#eff8ff;color:var(--speed);font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(2,132,199,.12)}

/* CONTRASEÑA */
.pw-label-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px}
.pw-in{
  width:100%;padding:16px 18px;
  background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;
  outline:none;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:8px;
  text-align:center;color:var(--text);caret-color:var(--speed);
  transition:border-color .15s;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}
.pw-in:focus{border-color:var(--speed);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(2,132,199,.1)}
.err{color:var(--danger);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;display:none;margin-top:6px}
.err.show{display:block}

/* BOTÓN INGRESAR */
.btn-in{
  width:100%;margin-top:16px;padding:18px;border:none;border-radius:14px;
  background:var(--dark);color:#fff;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px;
  cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(12,74,110,.3);
  transition:opacity .2s,transform .1s;
}
.btn-in:disabled{opacity:.2;cursor:not-allowed;box-shadow:none}
.btn-in:not(:disabled):active{transform:scale(.98)}

/* ══ WAITING ══ */
#sc-waiting{background:var(--bg)}
.w-banner{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--card);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border2);padding:12px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.w-ev-logo{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:10px;background:#fff;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.w-ev-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;background:#fff}
.w-ev-name{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:var(--text)}
.w-ev-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px}
.w-center{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;text-align:center}
.w-disc-pill{padding:6px 20px;border-radius:50px;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px}
.w-disc-pill.speed    {background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;border:1.5px solid #93c5fd}
.w-disc-pill.freestyle{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;border:1.5px solid #86efac}
.w-disc-pill.skills   {background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;border:1.5px solid #fcd34d}
.w-judge-big{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(54px,13vw,80px);font-weight:900;line-height:1;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:12px}
.w-wait-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase}

/* ══ SCORING ══ */
#sc-scoring{background:var(--bg)}
.sc-strip{flex-shrink:0;padding:6px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)}
.sc-strip.speed    {background:#eff8ff}.sc-strip.freestyle{background:#ecfdf5}.sc-strip.skills{background:#fffbeb}
.sc-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.sc-dot.speed{background:var(--speed)}.sc-dot.freestyle{background:var(--freestyle)}.sc-dot.skills{background:var(--skills)}
.sc-dn{font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.sc-dn.speed{color:var(--speed)}.sc-dn.freestyle{color:var(--freestyle)}.sc-dn.skills{color:var(--skills)}
.sc-ath{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--card);padding:12px 18px 10px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border2)}
.sc-an{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:3px}
.sc-nm{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:900;color:var(--text);line-height:1}
.sc-cl{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px}
.sc-pt{display:inline-block;margin-top:5px;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:50px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;border:1px solid #93c5fd}
.sc-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;padding:14px 18px 8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.flbl2{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.fmt-tag{font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700}
.fmt-s{background:#dbeafe;color:var(--speed)}.fmt-f{background:#dcfce7;color:var(--freestyle)}
.big-in{width:100%;padding:16px 10px;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;outline:none;font-size:48px;font-weight:900;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',monospace;letter-spacing:3px;text-align:center;color:var(--text);caret-color:transparent;transition:border-color .15s;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.big-in:focus{border-color:var(--speed);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(2,132,199,.1)}
.big-in.free:focus{border-color:var(--freestyle);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(5,150,105,.1)}
.pen-in{width:100%;padding:12px 10px;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;outline:none;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',monospace;letter-spacing:2px;text-align:center;color:var(--danger);caret-color:transparent}
.pen-in:focus{border-color:var(--danger);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,.1)}
.pen-dec{width:100%;padding:12px 10px;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',monospace;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;text-align:center;color:var(--danger);outline:none}
.pen-dec:focus{border-color:var(--danger);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,.1)}
.sc-foot{flex-shrink:0;padding:10px 18px calc(10px + var(--safe-b));background:var(--bg);border-top:2px solid var(--border2)}
.btn-conf{width:100%;padding:18px;border:none;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#15803d);color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;box-shadow:0 5px 18px rgba(22,163,74,.3)}
.btn-conf:active{opacity:.88}

/* ══ MODAL ══ */
.modal-bg{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,.6);z-index:900;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px}
.modal-bg.show{display:flex}
.modal-sh{width:100%;max-width:420px;background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:26px 24px 22px;box-shadow:0 16px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.22);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;gap:8px}
.m-handle{width:32px;height:4px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--border2);margin-bottom:4px}
.m-sysname{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}
.m-ath{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:var(--text);width:100%}
.m-score{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',monospace;font-size:68px;font-weight:900;color:var(--ok);line-height:1;margin:4px 0}
.m-pen-tag{font-size:13px;color:var(--danger);min-height:18px;font-weight:600}
.m-btns{display:flex;gap:10px;width:100%;margin-top:8px}
.btn-edit{flex:1;padding:14px;background:var(--bg);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;color:var(--text2);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
.btn-send{flex:2;padding:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#15803d);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer}

/* ══ DONE ══ */
#sc-done{background:var(--bg)}
.done-banner{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--card);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border2);padding:12px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.05)}
.done-ev-logo{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;background:#fff;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border2);overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.done-ev-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;background:#fff}
.done-ev-name{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:19px;font-weight:900;color:var(--text)}
.done-ev-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:1px}
.done-sent-tag{background:rgba(74,222,128,.18);border:1px solid rgba(74,222,128,.4);border-radius:50px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#16a34a;letter-spacing:1px}
.done-center{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;text-align:center;gap:8px}
.done-icon{font-size:54px}
.done-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;color:var(--text)}
.done-judge{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(38px,10vw,56px);font-weight:900;color:var(--text2);line-height:1}
.done-score{background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 40px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',monospace;font-size:52px;font-weight:900;color:var(--ok)}
.done-wait{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SPLASH -->
<div id="sc-splash" class="screen active">
  <img class="emood" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="E-MOOD Systems" style="height:40px">
  <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:-8px">Parkour Scoring System</div>
  <div class="spl-logo"><img id="spl-img" src="" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt=""></div>
  <div class="spl-title" id="spl-ev">PARKOUR SCORING PRO</div>
  <div class="spl-sub" id="spl-meta">Conectando al servidor...</div>
  <button class="btn-spl" onclick="goLogin()">🔐 Iniciar Sesión</button>
</div>

<!-- LOGIN -->
<div id="sc-login" class="screen">
  <div class="lgn-top">
    <div class="lgn-top-brand">
      <img class="emood" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="E-MOOD Systems" style="height:26px">
      <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);text-transform:uppercase">Parkour Scoring System</div>
    </div>
    <div class="lgn-ev-row">
      <div class="lgn-ev-logo"><img id="lgn-img" src="" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt=""></div>
      <div>
        <div class="lgn-ev-name" id="lgn-ev">Parkour Scoring Pro</div>
        <div class="lgn-ev-date" id="lgn-date"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="lgn-scroll">
    <!-- ROL -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="flabel">Rol</div>
      <div class="role-row">
        <div class="role-card" onclick="selRole('ocmember',this)">
          <div class="ri">⚙️</div><div class="rn">OC Member</div><div class="rs">Administrador</div>
        </div>
        <div class="role-card" onclick="selRole('judge',this)">
          <div class="ri">🏅</div><div class="rn">Juez</div><div class="rs">Ingreso de notas</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DISCIPLINA -->
    <div id="sec-disc" style="display:none;margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="flabel">Disciplina</div>
      <div class="disc-row">
        <div class="disc-chip speed"     onclick="selDisc('speed',this)"><span class="di">⚡</span>Velocidad</div>
        <div class="disc-chip freestyle" onclick="selDisc('freestyle',this)"><span class="di">🎭</span>Libre</div>
        <div class="disc-chip skills"    onclick="selDisc('skills',this)"><span class="di">🎯</span>Skills</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- TIPO DE JUEZ -->
    <div id="sec-jtype" style="display:none;margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="flabel">Tipo de Juez</div>
      <div class="jtype-grid" id="jtype-grid"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTRASEÑA -->
    <div id="sec-pw" style="display:none">
      <div class="flabel">Contraseña</div>
      <input class="pw-in" type="password" id="pw-in" placeholder="••••••"
        autocomplete="off" oninput="clearErr()" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()">
      <div class="err" id="err-msg">Contraseña incorrecta</div>
      <button class="btn-in" id="btn-lgn" onclick="doLogin()" disabled>INGRESAR →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WAITING -->
<div id="sc-waiting" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
      <img class="emood" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="E-MOOD" style="height:22px">
      <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);text-transform:uppercase">Parkour Scoring System</div>
    </div>
    <div><span class="conn-dot"></span><span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">Conectado</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="w-banner">
    <div class="w-ev-logo"><img id="w-logo" src="" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt=""></div>
    <div><div class="w-ev-name" id="w-ev">Parkour Scoring Pro</div><div class="w-ev-sub" id="w-sub"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="w-center">
    <div class="w-disc-pill speed" id="w-disc">VELOCIDAD</div>
    <div class="w-judge-big" id="w-judge">Juez</div>
    <div class="w-wait-lbl">— esperando atleta —</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SCORING -->
<div id="sc-scoring" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar" style="padding:8px 16px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
      <img class="emood" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="E-MOOD" style="height:20px">
      <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-transform:uppercase">Parkour Scoring System</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tb-right" id="sc-tj">Juez</div>
  </div>
  <div class="sc-strip speed" id="sc-strip"><div class="sc-dot speed" id="sc-dot"></div><div class="sc-dn speed" id="sc-dn">VELOCIDAD</div></div>
  <div class="sc-ath">
    <div class="sc-an" id="sc-an">ATLETA</div>
    <div class="sc-nm" id="sc-nm">—</div>
    <div class="sc-cl" id="sc-cl"></div>
    <span class="sc-pt" id="sc-pt" style="display:none">PASADA 1</span>
  </div>
  <div class="sc-body">
    <div>
      <div class="flbl2"><span id="sc-ml">TIEMPO</span><span class="fmt-tag fmt-s" id="sc-mf">00:00.00</span></div>
      <input class="big-in" id="sc-main" type="text" placeholder="00:00.00" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off" oninput="onMain()" onkeydown="onMainKey(event)">
    </div>
    <div id="sc-pen-wrap" style="display:none">
      <div class="flbl2"><span>PENALIZACIÓN</span><span class="fmt-tag" style="background:#fee2e2;color:var(--danger)" id="sc-pf">00:00.00</span></div>
      <input class="pen-in" id="sc-pen" type="text" placeholder="00:00.00" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off" oninput="onPen()" onkeydown="onPenKey(event)">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sc-foot"><button class="btn-conf" onclick="openModal()">✓ CONFIRMAR NOTA</button></div>
</div>

<!-- DONE -->
<div id="sc-done" class="screen">
  <div class="topbar" style="padding:10px 18px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
      <img class="emood" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="E-MOOD" style="height:22px">
      <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-transform:uppercase">Parkour Scoring System</div>
    </div>
    <div class="done-sent-tag">✓ ENVIADA</div>
  </div>
  <div class="done-banner">
    <div class="done-ev-logo"><img id="d-logo" src="" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt=""></div>
    <div><div class="done-ev-name" id="d-ev">Parkour Scoring Pro</div><div class="done-ev-sub" id="d-sub"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="done-center">
    <div class="done-icon">✅</div>
    <div class="done-title">¡Nota Enviada!</div>
    <div class="done-judge" id="d-judge">Juez</div>
    <div class="done-score" id="d-score">--</div>
    <div class="done-wait">— Esperando siguiente atleta —</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="modal">
  <div class="modal-sh">
    <div class="m-handle"></div>
    <img class="emood" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="E-MOOD" style="height:20px;margin-bottom:2px">
    <div class="m-sysname">Parkour Scoring System</div>
    <div class="m-ath" id="m-ath">Atleta</div>
    <div class="m-score" id="m-score">0.00</div>
    <div class="m-pen-tag" id="m-pen"></div>
    <div class="m-btns">
      <button class="btn-edit" onclick="closeModal()">← Editar</button>
      <button class="btn-send" onclick="submitScore()">ENVIAR ✓</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<button id="fs-btn" onclick="toggleFS()" title="Pantalla completa">⛶</button>

<script src="/socket.io/socket.io.js"></script>
<script>
var socket=io({reconnection:true,reconnectionDelay:1000,reconnectionAttempts:Infinity});
var role=null,disc=null,jtype=null,ctx=null,mDigs='',pDigs='';
var ev={name:'Parkour Scoring Pro',date:'',venue:'',logo:''};
var _authed=false;

var JT={
  speed:[
    {id:'c1t1',label:'Carril 1 · T1',hasPen:true},{id:'c1t2',label:'Carril 1 · T2',hasPen:false},
    {id:'c2t1',label:'Carril 2 · T1',hasPen:true},{id:'c2t2',label:'Carril 2 · T2',hasPen:false}
  ],
  freestyle:[
    {id:'d1',label:'Dificultad 1',hasPen:true},{id:'d2',label:'Dificultad 2',hasPen:false},
    {id:'d3',label:'Dificultad 3',hasPen:false},{id:'e1',label:'Ejecución 1',hasPen:false},
    {id:'e2',label:'Ejecución 2',hasPen:false},{id:'e3',label:'Ejecución 3',hasPen:false}
  ],
  skills:[
    {id:'sk1',label:'Skill 1',hasPen:false},{id:'sk2',label:'Skill 2',hasPen:false},
    {id:'sk3',label:'Skill 3',hasPen:false},{id:'sk4',label:'Skill 4',hasPen:false},
    {id:'sk5',label:'Skill 5',hasPen:false},{id:'sk6',label:'Skill 6',hasPen:false},
    {id:'sk7',label:'Skill 7',hasPen:false},{id:'sk8',label:'Skill 8',hasPen:false}
  ]
};
var DL={speed:'VELOCIDAD',freestyle:'ESTILO LIBRE',skills:'SKILLS'};

function showSc(n){document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(s){s.classList.remove('active')});document.getElementById('sc-'+n).classList.add('active');}
function goLogin(){showSc('login');}
function toggleFS(){if(!document.fullscreenElement)document.documentElement.requestFullscreen().catch(function(){});else document.exitFullscreen().catch(function(){});}

socket.on('connect',function(){if(_authed&&role&&disc&&jtype){socket.emit('auth',{role:role,discipline:disc,judgeType:jtype,password:document.getElementById('pw-in').value.trim()});}});
socket.on('disconnect',function(){_authed=false;});

socket.on('auth_result',function(d){
  if(!d.success){showErr(d.error||'Contraseña incorrecta');_authed=false;return;}
  if(d.role==='ocmember'){window.location.href='/';return;}
  _authed=true;
  if(role&&disc&&jtype)showSc('waiting');
  refreshW();
});

socket.on('state_sync',function(state){
  if(!state||!state.event)return;
  ev.name=state.event.name||'Parkour Scoring Pro';
  ev.date=state.event.date||'';
  ev.venue=state.event.venue||'';
  ev.logo=state.event.logoEvent||'';
  applyEv();
});

socket.on('open_athlete',function(c){
  if(c.discType==='speed'&&c.carril!=null){
    var jc=jtype&&jtype.startsWith('c1')?1:jtype&&jtype.startsWith('c2')?2:null;
    if(jc!==null&&jc!==c.carril)return;
  }
  ctx=c;showScoring(c);
});

socket.on('score_accepted',function(){
  var val=document.getElementById('sc-main').value||'--';
  var pen=document.getElementById('sc-pen').value;
  var meta=ev.date+(ev.date&&ev.venue?' · ':'')+ev.venue;
  var el;
  el=document.getElementById('d-score');  if(el)el.textContent=val+(pen?' (pen: '+pen+')':'');
  el=document.getElementById('d-judge');  if(el)el.textContent=getJL();
  el=document.getElementById('d-ev');     if(el)el.textContent=ev.name;
  el=document.getElementById('d-sub');    if(el)el.textContent=meta;
  el=document.getElementById('d-logo');   if(el&&ev.logo)el.src=ev.logo;
  mDigs='';pDigs='';
  el=document.getElementById('sc-main');if(el)el.value='';
  el=document.getElementById('sc-pen');if(el)el.value='';
  showSc('done');
});

function selRole(r,el){
  role=r;disc=null;jtype=null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.role-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active')});
  el.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('sec-disc').style.display=r==='judge'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('sec-jtype').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('sec-pw').style.display='block';
  valBtn();
}
function selDisc(d,el){
  disc=d;jtype=null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.disc-chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active')});
  el.classList.add('active');
  var g=document.getElementById('jtype-grid');g.innerHTML='';
  (JT[d]||[]).forEach(function(t){
    var p=document.createElement('div');p.className='jtype-pill';
    p.textContent=t.label;
    p.onclick=function(){selJtype(t.id,p);};
    g.appendChild(p);
  });
  document.getElementById('sec-jtype').style.display='block';valBtn();
}
function selJtype(id,el){
  jtype=id;
  document.querySelectorAll('.jtype-pill').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active')});
  el.classList.add('active');valBtn();
}
function valBtn(){document.getElementById('btn-lgn').disabled=!(role==='ocmember'||(role==='judge'&&disc&&jtype));}
function clearErr(){document.getElementById('err-msg').classList.remove('show');}
function showErr(m){var e=document.getElementById('err-msg');e.textContent=m;e.classList.add('show');}
function doLogin(){socket.emit('auth',{role:role,discipline:disc,judgeType:jtype,password:document.getElementById('pw-in').value.trim()});}

function getJL(){var t=(JT[disc]||[]).find(function(x){return x.id===jtype});return t?t.label:'Juez';}
function refreshW(){
  var meta=ev.date+(ev.date&&ev.venue?' · ':'')+ev.venue;
  var el;
  el=document.getElementById('w-judge');if(el)el.textContent=getJL();
  el=document.getElementById('w-ev');if(el)el.textContent=ev.name;
  el=document.getElementById('w-sub');if(el)el.textContent=meta;
  el=document.getElementById('w-logo');if(el&&ev.logo){el.src=ev.logo;el.style.display='';}
  var wd=document.getElementById('w-disc');if(wd){wd.textContent=DL[disc]||disc;wd.className='w-disc-pill '+(disc||'');}
}

function showScoring(c){
  var dc=c.discType||'speed',el;
  el=document.getElementById('sc-tj');if(el)el.textContent=getJL();
  el=document.getElementById('sc-strip');if(el)el.className='sc-strip '+dc;
  el=document.getElementById('sc-dot');if(el)el.className='sc-dot '+dc;
  el=document.getElementById('sc-dn');if(el){el.className='sc-dn '+dc;el.textContent=DL[dc]||dc;}
  el=document.getElementById('sc-an');if(el)el.textContent='ATLETA #'+(c.athleteNum||'?');
  el=document.getElementById('sc-nm');if(el)el.textContent=c.athleteName||'—';
  el=document.getElementById('sc-cl');if(el)el.textContent=c.athleteClub||'';
  var pt=document.getElementById('sc-pt');
  if(pt){if(c.passNum){pt.textContent='PASADA '+c.passNum;pt.style.display='inline-block';}else pt.style.display='none';}
  var isT=c.discType==='speed';
  var mi=document.getElementById('sc-main');
  mDigs='';pDigs='';if(mi)mi.value='';
  var sp=document.getElementById('sc-pen');if(sp)sp.value='';
  if(isT){
    if(mi){mi.className='big-in';mi.placeholder='00:00.00';}
    el=document.getElementById('sc-ml');if(el)el.textContent='TIEMPO';
    el=document.getElementById('sc-mf');if(el){el.textContent='00:00.00';el.className='fmt-tag fmt-s';}
  }else{
    if(mi){mi.className='big-in free';mi.placeholder='0.00';}
    el=document.getElementById('sc-ml');if(el)el.textContent='NOTA';
    el=document.getElementById('sc-mf');if(el){el.textContent='0.00';el.className='fmt-tag fmt-f';}
  }
  var penIn=document.getElementById('sc-pen');
  if(penIn){penIn.dataset.isTime=isT?'1':'0';penIn.placeholder=isT?'00:00.00':'0.00';penIn.className=isT?'pen-in':'pen-dec';}
  var pf=document.getElementById('sc-pf');if(pf)pf.textContent=isT?'00:00.00':'0.00';
  var hp=(JT[disc]||[]).find(function(x){return x.id===jtype});
  el=document.getElementById('sc-pen-wrap');if(el)el.style.display=(hp&&hp.hasPen)?'block':'none';
  showSc('scoring');
  setTimeout(function(){if(mi)mi.focus();},300);
}

function onMain(){
  var i=document.getElementById('sc-main');if(!i)return;
  if(ctx&&ctx.discType==='speed'){mDigs=i.value.replace(/\D/g,'').slice(0,6);i.value=fmtT(mDigs);}
  else{var r=i.value.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,'');var p=r.split('.');if(p.length>2)r=p[0]+'.'+p.slice(1).join('');i.value=r;}
}
function onMainKey(e){if(ctx&&ctx.discType==='speed')tKey(e,'main');else if(e.key==='Enter')openModal();}
function onPen(){var i=document.getElementById('sc-pen');if(!i)return;if(i.dataset.isTime==='1'){pDigs=i.value.replace(/\D/g,'').slice(0,6);i.value=fmtT(pDigs);}}
function onPenKey(e){var pi=document.getElementById('sc-pen');if(pi&&pi.dataset.isTime==='1')tKey(e,'pen');else if(e.key==='Enter')openModal();}
function tKey(e,f){
  if(e.key==='Enter'){openModal();return;}
  var ok=['Backspace','Delete','Tab','ArrowLeft','ArrowRight'];
  if(!ok.includes(e.key)&&!/^\d$/.test(e.key)){e.preventDefault();return;}
  var i=f==='main'?document.getElementById('sc-main'):document.getElementById('sc-pen');
  var d=f==='main'?mDigs:pDigs;
  if(e.key==='Backspace')d=d.slice(0,-1);
  else if(/^\d$/.test(e.key)){if(d.length<6)d+=e.key;}else return;
  e.preventDefault();
  if(f==='main')mDigs=d;else pDigs=d;
  if(i)i.value=fmtT(d);
}
function fmtT(d){var s=d.padStart(6,'0');return s[0]+s[1]+':'+s[2]+s[3]+'.'+s[4]+s[5];}
function openModal(){
  var val=document.getElementById('sc-main')?document.getElementById('sc-main').value:'--';
  var pen=document.getElementById('sc-pen')?document.getElementById('sc-pen').value:'';
  var hp=(JT[disc]||[]).find(function(x){return x.id===jtype});
  var el;
  el=document.getElementById('m-ath');if(el)el.textContent=(ctx&&ctx.athleteName||'Atleta')+(ctx&&ctx.passNum?' · Pasada '+ctx.passNum:'');
  el=document.getElementById('m-score');if(el)el.textContent=val||'0.00';
  el=document.getElementById('m-pen');if(el)el.textContent=(hp&&hp.hasPen&&pen)?'Penalización: '+pen:'';
  document.getElementById('modal').classList.add('show');
}
function closeModal(){document.getElementById('modal').classList.remove('show');}
function submitScore(){
  closeModal();if(!ctx)return;
  socket.emit('judge_submit',{
    discType:ctx.discType,judgeType:jtype,
    dId:ctx.dId,cId:ctx.cId,rId:ctx.rId,eId:ctx.eId,passNum:ctx.passNum,
    value:document.getElementById('sc-main')?document.getElementById('sc-main').value:'',
    penalty:document.getElementById('sc-pen')?document.getElementById('sc-pen').value:''
  });
}
function applyEv(){
  var meta=ev.date+(ev.date&&ev.venue?' · ':'')+ev.venue;
  var map={'spl-ev':ev.name,'spl-meta':meta||'E-MOOD Systems · Parkour Scoring System',
           'lgn-ev':ev.name,'lgn-date':meta,'w-ev':ev.name,'w-sub':meta};
  Object.keys(map).forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent=map[id];});
  ['spl-img','lgn-img','w-logo'].forEach(function(id){
    if(ev.logo){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.src=ev.logo;el.style.display='';}}
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
